business.type_label: LED-sign maker (custom LED/neon signage manufacturer, DELIGHT)

engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is evaluating a THING (custom LED signs) via feature/value arguments — 3 pillars (price/speed/quality), 6 lighting types with specs, ordering process. Portfolio is present but functions as supporting proof for the product argument, not as the primary decision object.

goal.one_action: submit an inquiry / request a quote for a custom LED sign

structure.archetype_note: Multi-page manufacturer site (14 nav items visible w/ dropdowns); crawl captured home + strengths + portfolio index + flow + company + off-site Tally form. Conversion handed off to two separate external form tools.

mapped.observed_as: DELIGHTは、イメージ通りのLEDサインをご提案します
価格・短納期・ハイクオリティー (3-pillar value prop)
選べる発光タイプ / Light emitting face (6 lighting types)
選ばれる理由 / 低価格の秘密・圧倒的なスピード (why chosen, low-cost secret)
ご注文の流れ / Flow (5-step ordering)
企業理念 / Philosophy — 最適解まで、設計する。
会社概要 / Company Profile + 特定商取引法表記 (legal commerce-act disclosure)
お問合せフォーム (Tally-hosted inquiry form)
10秒見積 / 自動見積はコチラ (instant-quote CTA)

unmapped.observed: 特定商取引法に基づく表記 (Japan Specified-Commercial-Transactions-Act legal disclosure table: cancellation-fee schedule, returns/defect, 1-yr warranty)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A jurisdiction-mandated legal-commerce disclosure table; not marketing/objection content — closest canonical is a catch-all

confidence.why: fetch_quality=rendered (not full) so confidence capped at medium; engine/goal are clear from captured sections and CTAs, but full nav (14 items, /製品情報 product-info subtree) was only partially crawled.

gap_findings: Two SEPARATE off-domain conversion handoffs on one site: a Tally-hosted inquiry form AND a form-mailer.jp automated instant-quote (10秒見積) tool. Current lead-form capability assumes an on-page form; both are off-site tools (like external-list-signup, but for inquiry and for auto-quote respectively).

The automated instant-quote/estimate tool ('10秒見積/自動見積') is a self-serve computed-price generator — resembles interactive-calculators but is an external quoting tool and is a second parallel primary CTA alongside the inquiry form; the taxonomy has no clean way to express dual-primary-CTA (inquiry vs instant-quote).
Japan legal 特定商取引法 disclosure table has no canonical section id (mapped to miscellaneous) — likely recurs across JP commerce sites.
EN subheadings on JA content is decorative, not true bilingual — languages stays [ja]; taxonomy's bilingual flag could be falsely triggered by decorative romanized headings.
